2605.00513.title: ControBench: An Interaction-Aware Benchmark for Controversial Discourse Analysis on Social Networks
2605.00513.paper_summary: Understanding how people argue across ideological divides online is important for studying political polarization, misinformation, and content moderation. Existing datasets capture only part of this problem: some preserve text but ignore interaction structure, some model structure without rich semantics, and others represent conversations without stable user-level ideological identity. We introduce ControBench, a benchmark for controversial discourse analysis that combines heterogeneous social interaction graphs with rich textual semantics. Built from Reddit discussions on three topics, Trump, abortion, and religion, ControBench contains 7,370 users, 1,783 posts, and 26,525 interactions. The graph contains user and post nodes connected by semantically enriched edges; in particular, user-comment-user edges encode both a reply and the parent comment that it responds to, preserving local argumentative context. User labels are derived from self-declared Reddit flairs, providing a scalable proxy for ideological identity without manual annotation. The resulting datasets exhibit low or negative adjusted homophily (Trump: -0.77, Abortion: 0.06, Religion: 0.04), reflecting the cross-cutting structure of real-world debate. We evaluate graph neural networks, pretrained language models, and large language models on ControBench and observe distinct performance patterns across topics and model families, especially when ideological boundaries are ambiguous. These results position ControBench as a challenging and realistic benchmark for controversial discourse analysis.
2605.00513.paper_summary_zh: 理解人們如何在意識形態的分歧中進行線上辯論，對於研究政治極化、錯誤資訊和內容管理至關重要。現有的數據集僅捕捉到這一問題的一部分：有些保留了文本但忽略了互動結構，有些則模擬結構卻缺乏豐富的語義，而其他則在沒有穩定用戶層面意識形態身份的情況下表示對話。我們介紹了ControBench，一個結合異質社交互動圖和豐富文本語義的爭議性話語分析基準。ControBench基於三個主題的Reddit討論構建，即特朗普、墮胎和宗教，包含7,370名用戶、1,783條帖子和26,525次互動。該圖包含用戶和帖子節點，通過語義豐富的邊連接；特別是，用戶-評論-用戶邊編碼了回覆及其所回覆的父評論，保留了局部的辯論上下文。用戶標籤來自自我聲明的Reddit標籤，提供了一種可擴展的意識形態身份代理，無需手動註釋。結果數據集顯示出低或負的調整同質性（特朗普：-0.77，墮胎：0.06，宗教：0.04），反映了現實世界辯論的交叉結構。我們在ControBench上評估圖神經網絡、預訓練語言模型和大型語言模型，並觀察到不同主題和模型家族之間的明顯性能模式，特別是在意識形態邊界模糊的情況下。這些結果使ControBench成為一個具有挑戰性和現實性的爭議性話語分析基準。
2605.00513.author: Ta Thanh Thuy et.al.
2605.00513.authors: Ta Thanh Thuy, Jiaqi Zhu, Xuan Liu, Lin Shang, Reihaneh Rabbany, Guillaume Rabusseau, Lihui Chen, Zheng Yilun, Sitao Luan
